meaning: n.挖泥机,挖泥船,捞网,撒粉器
examples: So far we haven't used high depth dredger.
The slurry pump is one of the key facilities of a dredger.
A dredger is a boat or a device which is used to dredge rivers.
Steven Robertson fell from the scallop dredger St Amant off the coast of Anglesey on 13 January last year.
He said the crew of a scallop dredger chased him off his "own ground" during the attack on Friday.
